BROODMOTHER-SHIFT.description: Transforms to alternate form when enters your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-SHIFT.title: Shift
BROODMOTHER-STICKY.description:
If this card would go to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] after being played, return it to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Retain[/gold] while [gold]Sticky[/gold].
BROODMOTHER-STICKY.title: Sticky
BROODMOTHER-BITE.description: When played, increase the damage of ALL [gold]Bites[/gold] by 1.
BROODMOTHER-BITE.title: Bite
BROODMOTHER-POLLINATED.description: Gains [gold]Sticky[/gold] at the start of combat.
BROODMOTHER-POLLINATED.title: Pollinated
